name: Festival Greeting
description: Warm festive wishes for occasions, holidays and national days
briefInstructions: Focus on emotional warmth and community celebration. NO product UI, NO dashboards, NO screens. People should be celebrating together — families, neighbours, society members. The scene must feel joyful and human, not commercial. The brand is a quiet, warm presence — not the hero of the image. Reserve space for the greeting text overlay at the bottom.

inputs.label: Greeting Message
inputs.placeholder: e.g. May this festival bring joy, prosperity and togetherness
suggestions: May this festival bring joy, prosperity and togetherness to your home
Wishing you and your family a blessed and joyful celebration
May the light of this occasion guide your path to success
Celebrating the spirit of togetherness and community
